exercises.title: Render with operation=
exercises.description: Implement cat_circuit() to return a circuit built with circuit() using the operation= parameter for PrepareCatState.
hints: The `operation=` parameter takes a string — the name of a Q# operation that accepts only qubits or qubit arrays.
exercises.solutionExplanation: The `operation=` parameter lets the renderer decide the qubit allocation. Pass the operation name as a string without parentheses or arguments.

exercises.title: Flatten a grouped circuit
exercises.description: Implement flat_circuit() to return a circuit for GHZ(3) with grouping disabled so each gate is shown individually.
exercises.solutionExplanation: Setting `group_by_scope=False` tells the renderer to flatten all operations instead of grouping them by their containing scope (function calls, loops).
